Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 51 

CLM_SRVC_CLSFCTN_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Claim Service Classification Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: The type of service provided to the beneficiary. 

SHORT NAME: CLM_SRVC_CLSFCTN_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: CLM_SRVC_CLSFCTN_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 

VALUES: For facility type code 1 thru 6, and
